disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute onset today of diffuse body aching, bilateral puffy fingers and profound fatigue in someone with a known anti-U1 RNP antibody
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any diagnosed conditions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I woke up aching all over with these puffy sausage fingers and I'm completely wiped out. I do have some autoimmune thing — they found an antibody, anti-U1 RNP, but told me it was mild.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No shortness of breath, no cough and no chest pain on screening
trigger_question_examples: Are you having any trouble breathing or any chest pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my breathing's fine and I don't have any chest pain or cough.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sharp pain on breathing in (no pleuritic pain) on targeted questioning
trigger_question_examples: Do you get a sharp, catching pain when you breathe in?
Any pain when you take a deep breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't get any sharp pain when I breathe in.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever measured; feels intermittently warm but no rigors
trigger_question_examples: Have you had a fever or chills?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel a bit warm on and off but I haven't taken my temperature, and I haven't had shivering or sweats.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fingers are puffy but not painful, and have not turned white or blue (no digital colour change or ischaemia)
trigger_question_examples: Have your fingers changed colour — gone white or blue?
Are your fingers painful or cold, or just swollen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're just puffy and stiff — they haven't gone white or blue and they're not agony, more of a tight, swollen feeling.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone, has been bedbound/couch-bound since the afternoon with poor oral intake and some nausea
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you at home?
Have you been able to eat and drink today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own, and I've barely made it off the couch since this afternoon. I've hardly eaten because I feel so drained and a bit sick in the stomach.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No new rash or mouth ulcers
trigger_question_examples: Any new rashes, especially on your face or in the sun?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No new rashes anywhere, and no mouth ulcers.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No confusion or drowsiness; thinking clearly on screening
trigger_question_examples: Are you feeling confused or unusually drowsy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm thinking clearly, just exhausted.
